species.notes: Cattle support remains provisional until species-split and ancestry rules are made explicit in code.

species_manifest.scientific_scope: Cattle support remains split-sensitive. Wild or progenitor context must not be flattened into domesticated-core cattle support.
species_manifest.runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.

support_statement: Paper-pinned core domestication support exists for this species. Curated projects are fit for governed comparative use, while pending projects still need stronger archive-paper linkage.

curated_projects.paper_title: Ancient cattle genomics, origins, and rapid turnover in the Fertile Crescent
curated_projects.notes: Near East cattle origins and turnover anchor.
curated_projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.

curated_projects.paper_title: The genomic natural history of the aurochs
curated_projects.notes: Aurochs genomic natural-history context for cattle domestication.
curated_projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.

pending_projects.notes: Ancient Galician cattle mtDNA dataset kept archive-verified until explicit primary-paper linkage is encoded.
pending_projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The current curated project inventory does not yet identify a shipped Nordic-localized lead for this record.
